tools.name: scan_ai_visibility
tools.description:
Start a free AI-visibility scan for a B2B company's website.

    Checks how often AI engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini) name the
    company when buyers ask for vendor recommendations, and finds the gaps. The
    scan runs in the background (roughly 1-2 minutes); call get_visibility_repo

tools.name: get_visibility_report
tools.description:
Fetch the results of an AI-visibility scan started with scan_ai_visibility.

    Args:
        report_id: The id returned by scan_ai_visibility.

    Returns:
        While running: {status: "running", progress}. When done: the visibility
        score, how often AI mentions the brand, share of voic

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: scan_ai_visibility · Public sink: scan_ai_visibility, get_visibility_report.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: scan_ai_visibility · Public sink: scan_ai_visibility, get_visibility_report

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
